items.name: Caramel Red Apple Head
items.description: Get your sweet tooth ready with the Caramel Apple Head! This deliciously fun accessory turns your avatar’s head into a shiny, sticky treat—complete with gooey caramel dripping down the sides. With its glossy candy coating and a playful, quirky look, it’s perfect for anyone who wants to bring a taste of autumn to their Roblox style. It’s not just a snack; it’s a statement! Just be careful—people might want to take a bite!

items.name: Blueberrinni Octopusini
items.description:
🫐🐙 Blueberrinni Octopusini 🐙🫐

From the sparkling Blueberry Seas 🌊✨ comes Blueberrinni Octopusini — the sweetest, splashiest little legend to ever pop into Pop Box! 💙🎉

With shimmering blueberry-blue tentacles 🫐💫 and a bubbly personality that pops with energy 💥😆, this ocean cutie loves bouncing, spinning, and celebrating every big win! 🏆🎊 Rumor says each tentacle holds a tiny burst of lucky pop power… but only true Pop Box players can unlock it! 🎯🔥

Dripping in berry sparkle ✨🫧 and ocean magic 🌊🔮, Blueberrinni Octopusini isn’t just adorable — it’s a badge of honor for dedicated pop masters! 💙👑

🌟 LIMITED TIME
🎮 ONLY in Pop Box
🚫 Nowhere else

Catch it before it swims back to the deep blue! 🌊⏳🐙
